home.question-description: Generate infinite maths problems, with solutions and explanation for free!
home.editor-description: An editor specialised in making question and exam papers. Easy to create and navigate with inbuilt templates all for free!
home.but-how-description: Using smart algorithms, we can generate questions with solutions at all levels of difficulty within a second.

education.primary-school-description: Build a strong foundation in mathematics here with curriculum-aligned questions. Each question difficulty can be adjusted making it easier to pick up new concepts.
education.secondary-school-description: Progress through Key Stage 3 and GCSE-style maths: fluency in number and algebra, reasoning with geometry and statistics, and exam-style problem solving—with adjustable difficulty.
education.sixth-form-description: A-level style pure and applied strands: calculus, trigonometry, sequences, vectors, probability, and proof. Tackle harder questions with full solutions when you are ready.

about.description: This website is made by a solo developer with the aim of helping students and teachers to create maths problems for free. Allowing students only needing one website to generate infinite questions with solutions and explanations, and allowing teachers to create exam papers with ease and efficiency. This website is currently in early beta stages, so expect some errors and missing features or translations.
about.contactInfo: Feel free to email about any suggestions, problems or translations.

updates.description: Here is a track of each update to the website, feel free to email and suggest any ideas or problems.
updates.sideNote: (This website is currently in beta versions, meaning this is not close to the final product)

questions.no-question-generated: No question generated yet, click the button below to generate one!
questions.keyboard-hint: Use LaTeX keys to type your answer.

start.upload-description: Continue editing your file by adding it bellow!
start.drag-drop-file: Drag & drop a file here, or click to select one

notification.server-side-fail-please-try-again-later: Server side fail, please try again later
notification.please-select-or-double-click-an-element: Please select or double click an element

templates.templates-description: Click on a template to add it to the current page
templates.name: Name

primary.numbers: Learn to count, read, write, compare, and understand numbers, including place value and rounding.
primary.addition-subtraction: Develop skills in adding and subtracting numbers using different methods and solving simple problems.
primary.multiplication-division: Understand multiplication and division, including times tables, grouping, and sharing.
primary.fractions-decimals-percentages: Explore fractions, decimals, and percentages and learn how they relate to each other.
primary.measurement: Learn to measure length, mass, volume, time, and money using standard units.
primary.geometry: Study shapes, positions, angles, and properties of 2D and 3D objects.
primary.algebra: Introduce simple algebra concepts such as patterns, sequences, and basic equations.
primary.statistics: Learn to collect, organise, and interpret data using charts, tables, and graphs.
primary.problem-solving: Apply mathematical skills to solve a variety of real-life and reasoning problems.

numbers.counting: Count forwards and backwards, group objects, and use skip counting.
numbers.reading-and-writing-numbers: Read and write numerals and words, including zero and larger values.
numbers.place-value: Understand tens, hundreds, and how digit position changes value.
numbers.comparing-and-ordering-numbers: Use symbols and lists to compare and order whole numbers.
numbers.rounding-numbers: Round to the nearest ten or hundred for estimation.

addition-subtraction.mental-strategies: Use doubles, near doubles, and partitioning mentally.
addition-subtraction.number-bonds: Know pairs that make ten and extend to larger totals.
addition-subtraction.written-methods: Use column addition and subtraction with exchanging.
addition-subtraction.word-problems: Model add and subtract stories with diagrams and equations.

multiplication-division.times-tables: Recall and apply multiplication facts and related divisions.
multiplication-division.grouping-sharing: Interpret multiplication as repeated addition and division as sharing.
multiplication-division.written-multiplication: Use grid and compact methods for two-digit numbers.
multiplication-division.division-methods: Divide with remainders using grouping and short division.

fractions-decimals-percentages.fractions-basics: Recognise unit and non-unit fractions of shapes and sets.
fractions-decimals-percentages.equivalent-fractions: Find families of equivalent fractions on diagrams and number lines.
fractions-decimals-percentages.decimals: Understand tenths and hundredths and decimal notation.
fractions-decimals-percentages.percentages: Link percentages to hundredths and simple fractions.
fractions-decimals-percentages.simple-addition-subtraction-of-fractions: Description for Simple Addition Subtraction Of Fractions.
fractions-decimals-percentages.link-between-fractions-and-decimals: Description for Link Between Fractions And Decimals.

measurement.units: Choose and convert sensible units for everyday measures.
measurement.length-mass-capacity: Measure, compare, and read scales for length, mass, and volume.
measurement.time: Tell the time, read calendars, and solve duration problems.
measurement.money: Count coins, find change, and solve money problems.

geometry.shapes-2d: Name and describe polygons and circles.
geometry.shapes-3d: Identify faces, edges, and vertices of common solids.
geometry.symmetry: Find lines of symmetry and complete symmetric patterns.
geometry.angles: Compare angles and recognise right angles.
geometry.coordinates: Read and plot points in the first quadrant.

algebra.patterns: Continue and describe visual and numeric patterns.
algebra.sequences: Find rules for simple ascending and descending sequences.
algebra.missing-numbers: Solve frame problems and balance puzzles.
algebra.simple-equations: Use inverse operations to find unknown values.

statistics.collecting-data: Design simple surveys and tally results.
statistics.charts: Construct and read pictograms and bar charts.
statistics.tables: Interpret two-way tables and frequency tables.
statistics.averages: Find the mode and range for small data sets.

problem-solving.one-step: Choose the correct operation for single-step stories.
problem-solving.two-step: Plan order of operations in two-step word problems.
problem-solving.reasoning: Explain why an answer must be true using words and diagrams.
problem-solving.real-life: Apply maths to money, measure, and time contexts.

measurements.length-mass-volume-time: Description for Length Mass Volume Time.

data-handling.basic-interpretation-of-data: Description for Basic Interpretation Of Data.

secondary.number: Work with fractions, percentages, indices, standard form, and roots in real contexts.
secondary.algebra: Manipulate expressions: expand, factorise, simplify, and use algebraic notation fluently.
secondary.equations: Solve linear, quadratic, and simultaneous equations and interpret solutions.
secondary.ratio-proportion: Use ratios, proportion, percentages, and rates of change in problems.
secondary.geometry: Angles, shapes, constructions, transformations, perimeter, area, and volume.
secondary.probability-statistics: Represent data, estimate probability, and use averages and spread.
secondary.graphs: Plot and interpret linear, quadratic, and other graphs linked to equations.
secondary.trigonometry: Pythagoras, right-angled triangles, and basic trigonometric ratios.
secondary.problem-solving: Multi-step reasoning, modelling, and exam-style maths problems.

number.fdp: Move fluently between fractions, decimals, and percentages in problems.
number.indices-roots: Use index laws, square and cube roots, and exact forms.
number.standard-form: Write and calculate with numbers in standard form.
number.rounding-estimation: Round to significant figures and estimate to check answers.

algebra.expressions: Simplify, collect terms, and multiply single brackets.
algebra.expanding-factorising: Expand products and factorise into single brackets.
algebra.indices-algebra: Apply index laws to algebraic terms.
algebra.substitution: Evaluate expressions and formulae for given values.

equations.linear-equations: Solve linear equations including brackets and fractions.
equations.quadratic-intro: Factorise simple quadratics and use graphs.
equations.simultaneous: Solve pairs of linear equations algebraically and graphically.
equations.inequalities: Solve and represent linear inequalities on a number line.

ratio-proportion.ratio: Simplify ratios, share in a ratio, and compare ratios.
ratio-proportion.proportion: Solve direct and inverse proportion problems.
ratio-proportion.percentages-change: Find percentage change, reverse percentages, and interest.

geometry.angles-parallel: Use angle facts with parallel lines and polygons.
geometry.polygons: Interior and exterior angles, similarity, and congruence.
geometry.circles: Circumference, area, arcs, and sectors at foundation level.
geometry.area-volume: Compound shapes, prisms, and units of area and volume.
geometry.angles-rules-parallel-lines: Description for Angles Rules Parallel Lines.

probability-statistics.probability: Sample space, expectation, and tree diagrams.
probability-statistics.charts-data: Histograms, cumulative frequency, and time series.
probability-statistics.averages-spread: Mean, median, mode, range, and interquartile range.
probability-statistics.sampling: Bias, capture-recapture, and basic sampling ideas.

graphs.linear-graphs: Plot y = mx + c and interpret gradient and intercept.
graphs.quadratic-graphs: Sketch parabolas and read turning points.
graphs.gradient-intercept: Find equations of lines through two points.

trigonometry.pythagoras: Find unknown sides in right-angled triangles.
trigonometry.sohcahtoa: Use sine, cosine, and tangent for angles and sides.
trigonometry.sine-cosine-rule: Extend to non-right triangles when needed.

problem-solving.multi-step: Break complex questions into ordered stages.
problem-solving.modelling: Translate words into equations and graphs.
problem-solving.exam-style: Timed practice with mixed topics and mark schemes.

sixthForm.functions-graphs: Transformations, composite and inverse functions, modulus, and curve sketching.
sixthForm.differentiation: Gradients, tangents, rates of change, and applications including optimisation.
sixthForm.integration: Antiderivatives, definite integrals, area under curves, and simple kinematics links.
sixthForm.trigonometry: Radians, identities, equations, and the sine and cosine rules beyond right angles.
sixthForm.sequences-series: Arithmetic and geometric progressions, sigma notation, and convergence ideas.
sixthForm.exponentials-logarithms: Laws of logs and exponentials, equations, and growth and decay models.
sixthForm.vectors: 2D and 3D vectors, scalar product, lines, and basic geometric applications.
sixthForm.probability-statistics: Distributions, hypothesis tests, and data modelling at A-level depth.
sixthForm.proof-numerical: Proof techniques, iteration, and numerical methods that support advanced maths.
sixthForm.algebra: Build advanced algebraic fluency with polynomials, inequalities, logarithms and functions for A-level maths.
sixthForm.functions: Study functions, domains, inverses, transformations and graphs with algebraic and graphical understanding.
sixthForm.calculus: Explore differentiation, integration, limits and kinematics for rates of change and areas under curves.
sixthForm.statistics: Analyse probability, distributions, hypothesis testing and regression for statistical modelling.
sixthForm.mechanics: Apply forces, motion, moments and projectiles to solve mechanics problems in physics-maths contexts.
sixthForm.discrete: Investigate matrices, complex numbers, graph theory and linear programming for discrete maths.

functions-graphs.domain-range: State domains, ranges, and restrictions for standard functions.
functions-graphs.transformations: Apply translations, stretches, and reflections to graphs.
functions-graphs.inverses: Find and interpret inverse functions graphically and algebraically.
functions-graphs.modulus-piecewise: Sketch modulus graphs and piecewise definitions.

differentiation.first-principles: Differentiate from first principles for polynomials.
differentiation.rules: Product, quotient, and chain rules; exponentials and logarithms.
differentiation.tangents-normals: Equations of tangents and normals to curves.
differentiation.optimisation: Stationary points, second derivative test, and context problems.

integration.indefinite: Integrate polynomials, exponentials, and standard trig functions.
integration.definite-area: Evaluate definite integrals and find areas between curves.
integration.kinematics: Displacement, velocity, and acceleration from integration.

trigonometry.radians: Use radians on the unit circle and in calculus.
trigonometry.identities: Prove and apply Pythagorean and addition identities.
trigonometry.equations: Solve trigonometric equations in a given interval.
trigonometry.sine-cosine-rule: Solve triangles and model problems in 2D.

sequences-series.arithmetic-geometric: nth term, sum formulas, and sigma notation.
sequences-series.sigma-notation: Expand and evaluate sums written with sigma.
sequences-series.binomial: Binomial expansion for positive integer n and general term.

exponentials-logarithms.laws: Simplify expressions using log and exponential laws.
exponentials-logarithms.modelling: Fit growth and decay models to data.

vectors.basics: Magnitude, direction, addition, and scalar multiplication.
vectors.scalar-product: Dot product, angle between vectors, and perpendicularity.
vectors.lines: Vector equations of lines and shortest distance ideas.
vectors.addition-and-scalar-multiplication: Description for Addition And Scalar Multiplication.

probability-statistics.hypothesis-testing: Significance levels, critical regions, and p-values.

proof-numerical.proof: Proof by deduction, exhaustion, and contradiction where appropriate.
proof-numerical.numerical-methods: Root finding and numerical integration techniques.

functions.exponential-and-logarithmic-functions: Description for Exponential And Logarithmic Functions.

calculus.rules-product-quotient-chain: Description for Rules Product Quotient Chain.
calculus.indefinite-and-definite-integrals: Description for Indefinite And Definite Integrals.
